basic_details.job_title: IIT Bhilai Non Teaching Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 47 AEE, Junior Assistant and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Bhilai (IIT Bhilai)
basic_details.short_information: ndian Institute of Technology Bhilai (IIT Bhilai) Various Non-Teaching Positions Notification 2026 has been released on 27-04-2026 on the official website https://iitbhilai.ac.in . A total of 47 vacancies have been announced through the IIT Bhilai Various Non-Teaching Positions Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Assistant Registrar (AR): Maximum age 40 years. Junior Superintendent (JS): Maximum age 35 years. Junior Assistant (JA): Maximum age 30 years. Technical Officer (TO): Maximum age 40 years. Assistant Executive Engineer (AEE): Maximum age 40 years. Medical Officer (MO): Maximum age 40 years. Junior Technical Superintendent (JTS): Maximum age 35 years. Junior Sports Officer (JSO): Maximum age 35 years. Junior Technical Assistant (JTA): Maximum age 30 years. Junior Mechanic (JM): Maximum age 30 years. Age relaxation applicable as per GOI norms.

qualification.details: Assistant Registrar (AR): Master's degree with at least 55% marks or its equivalent Grade 'B' in the UGC 7-point scale from a recognized University/Institute. Minimum of eight (8) years of relevant experience, out of which three (3) years in the pay level 7 or equivalent pay or six (6) years in the pay level 6 or equivalent pay, should be in a Government, Semi-Government organization, recognized university, industry or technological institution (with proof of salary). Junior Superintendent (JS): Master's degree with at least 55% with relevant experience of three (3) years OR Bachelor's degree with relevant experience of five (5) years. Junior Assistant (JA): Bachelor's Degree with at least 55% marks from a recognized university. Technical Officer (TO): M.Tech./ M.E. or equivalent degree in relevant discipline with at least 55% marks or equivalent CGPA from a recognized University/ Institute with five (5) years of relevant experience, out of which three (3) years in the pay level 7 or equivalent pay or five (5) years in the pay level 6 or equivalent pay, should be in a Government, Semi-Government organization, recognized university, industry or technological institution (with proof of salary). OR B.Tech./B.E./B.Sc. Engineering (4 years) / Master's Degree in relevant discipline with at least 55% marks or equivalent CGPA from a recognized University/Institute with seven (7) years of relevant experience, out of which three (3) years in the pay level 7 or equivalent pay or five (5) years in the pay level 6 or equivalent pay, should be in a Government, Semi-Government organization, recognized university, industry or technological institution (with proof of salary). Assistant Executive Engineer (AEE): M.Tech./ M.E. in Electrical Engineering or equivalent degree with at least 55% marks or equivalent CGPA from a recognized University/Institute with five (5) years of relevant experience, out of which three (3) years should be in a Government, Semi-Government organization, recognized university, industry or technological institution in the pay level 7 or equivalent pay (with proof of salary). OR B.Tech. / B.E. in Electrical Engineering or equivalent degree with at least 55% marks or equivalent CGPA from a recognized University/Institute with seven (7) years of relevant experience, out of which three (3) years should be in a Government, Semi-Government organization, recognized university, industry or technological institution in the pay level 7 or equivalent pay (with proof of salary). Medical Officer (MO): MBBS degree from a University recognized by IMC including completion of Compulsory Rotary Internship (CRI) with at least 55% marks or equivalent CGPA and at least three (3) years working experience after the degree in the reputed and recognized hospital with not less than 20 beds. Junior Technical Superintendent (JTS): M.Tech. / M.E. or equivalent degree in relevant discipline with at least 55% marks or equivalent CGPA from a recognized University/Institute with one (1) year of relevant experience after the qualifying degree. OR B.Tech./B.E./B.Sc. Engineering (4 years) / Master's Degree in relevant discipline with at least 55% marks or equivalent CGPA from a recognized University/Institute with three (3) years of relevant experience after the qualifying degree. OR 3-year Diploma in Engineering/Bachelor's Degree in relevant discipline with at least 55% marks or equivalent CGPA from a recognized University/Institute with six (6) years of relevant experience after the qualifying degree. Junior Sports Officer (JSO): Master's degree in Physical Education (M.P.Ed)/ Sports Sciences or equivalent with at least 55% marks with three (3) years of relevant experience in any recognized institution. OR Bachelor's Degree in Physical Education (B.P.Ed)/ Sports Sciences or equivalent with at least 55% marks with five (5) years of relevant experience in any recognized institution. Junior Technical Assistant (JTA): B.Tech./B.E./B.Sc. Engineering (4 years) / Master's Degree in Science/Computer Science/Computer Application or equivalent degree in relevant discipline with at least 55% marks or equivalent CGPA from a recognized University/Institute. OR 3-year Diploma in Engineering (after 10+2) / Bachelor's Degree in Science/Computer Science/Computer Application or equivalent degree in relevant discipline with at least 55% marks or equivalent CGPA from a recognized University/Institute with three (3) years of relevant experience after the qualifying degree. Junior Mechanic (JM): B.Tech. / B.E. / B.Sc. Engineering (4 years) or equivalent degree in relevant discipline with at least 55% marks or equivalent CGPA from a recognized University/Institute. OR 3-year Diploma in Engineering (after 10+2) or equivalent in relevant discipline with at least 55% marks or equivalent CGPA from a recognized University/Institute with Three (3) years of relevant experience.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Technical Officer (TO) - Discipline: IT and Networking
Junior Technical Assistant (JTA) - Discipline: Computer Science & Engineering /Information Technology/Software Engineering or equivalent
Junior Technical Assistant (JTA) - Discipline: Chemistry/Physics or equivalent)
Junior Technical Assistant (JTA) - Discipline: Mechanical Engineering/Material Science & Metallurgy Engineering or equivalent
Junior Technical Assistant (JTA) - Discipline: Electrical Engineering/Electronics & Communication Engineering /Instrumentation or equivalent

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 18-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Bhilai to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT Bhilai Non-Teaching Positions?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the IIT Bhilai Various Non-Teaching Positions is 18 May 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for IIT Bhilai Non-Teaching Positions?
faq.answer: There are a total of 47 vacancies for various Non-Teaching Positions at IIT Bhilai. This includes roles like Junior Assistant, Technical Officer, and more.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for Junior Assistant (JA) at IIT Bhilai?
faq.answer: For the Junior Assistant (JA) post, candidates must possess a Bachelor's Degree with at least 55% marks from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for Assistant Registrar (AR) at IIT Bhilai?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Assistant Registrar (AR) position is 40 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per Government of India norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for UR/OBC-NCL/EWS candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for UR/OBC-NCL/EWS candidates for most positions is Rs 1000. For Group B & C posts, it is Rs 500.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for IIT Bhilai Non-Teaching Positions?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves a Written Test, followed by a Skill Test and an Interview for shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q7. Can candidates from outside Chhattisgarh apply for these positions?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates from all over India are eligible to apply, provided they meet the specified eligibility criteria for the respective posts.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary structure for the Non-Teaching Positions?
faq.answer: The salary for these positions ranges from Pay Level 3 to Level 10, with usual allowances admissible to Central Government employees.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any experience required for the Junior Assistant (JA) post?
faq.answer: No specific experience is mentioned as a requirement for the Junior Assistant (JA) post; a Bachelor's Degree with at least 55% marks is sufficient.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF for IIT Bhilai Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.
